title: Habenaria wallichii
taxonomy: Habenaria wallichii is a species of orchid native to the Himalayan region. This species belongs to the genus Habenaria, which is a large group of orchids commonly known as the "annelid orchids". The genus Habenaria is part of the subfamily Orchidoideae, which is one of the largest subfamilies of the orchid family, Orchidaceae. The subfamily Orchidoideae is further divided into several tribes, with Habenaria being part of the Habenariinae tribe. Habenaria wallichii's classification is therefore: Orchidaceae > Orchidoideae > Habenariinae > Habenaria.
